intended_use: The Precise Image is a reconstruction software application for a Computed Tomography X-Ray System intended to produce images of the head and body by computer reconstruction of x-ray transmission data
intended_use_full: The Precise Image is a reconstruction software application for a Computed Tomography X-Ray System intended to produce images of the head and body by computer reconstruction of x-ray transmission data taken at different angles and planes. Precise Image has been evaluated and available on preselected reference protocols for adult subjects. Precise Image is not indicated for use in pediatric subjects. The CT system with Precise Image is indicated for head, whole body and vascular X-ray Computed Tomography applications. These scanners are intended to be used for diagnostic imaging.
target_condition: General diagnostic imaging conditions requiring head, body, and vascular CT imaging
ground_truth: Comparison against predicate device Philips Incisive CT (K180015) and reference device Philips Brilliance iCT (K162838); evaluation by 6 board-certified radiologists using five-point Likert scale for diagnostic confidence, sharpness, noise level, image texture, and artifacts
other_metrics: Low contrast resolution: 5 mm @ 0.3% @ 5.5 mGy CTDIvol (improved from predicate 4 mm @ 0.3% @ 22 mGy); Noise reduction: up to 85% lower noise at 80% lower dose; Low contrast detectability: 60% better; Noise power spectrum: no more than 6% shift when noise reduced by at least 50%; Standard mode noise: 0.27% at 27 mGy
